requests.prompt: Full-frame start image, no inner frame, border, poster, inset, or pasted graphic. Use reference image 1 (examples/food/kangshifu-iced-black-tea.jpg) as the real product identity lock. Place the authentic Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle upright and centered on a matte light‑gray tabletop, at plausible scale and orientation. Background: soft cool blue gradient suggesting chill. Lighting: crisp, cool commercial light with soft highlights and minimal reflections; show subtle, non‑dripping condensation beads already on the bottle. Preserve product shape, colors, material, packaging, label layout, and visible marks; do not alter or invent text or logos. No other props. No hand or person. Not a product‑only packshot—include the tabletop and backdrop as the full scene. Product must remain clearly visible.
requests.negative_prompt: No captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, fake logo, random letters, extra fingers, warped hands, blurry product, wrong product, product-only packshot, empty background, inner frame, border, poster, inset image, image inside an image.
